[Assistant] Good — 4 entries found for nan-009 (#3562, #3563, #3565, #3569). All high quality: three ADRs with correct tags and category, one lesson (markdown injection). No low-quality entries to deprecate.

**Phase 1 Interim Results:**

```
Cycle: nan-009 | 2 sessions | 2308 records | 3h 18m

GATE FAILURES (rework signals):
- Gate 3a REWORKABLE FAIL: 2 agent reports missing Knowledge Stewardship blocks
- Gate 3b REWORKABLE FAIL: 14 missing phase tests + render.rs (544 lines) + tests.rs (1054 lines) over 500-line limit

HOTSPOTS (6 warnings, 4 info):
- F-03 compile_cycles: 81 cycles — iterative per-field changes during implementation
- F-05 tool_failure_hotspot: context_store failed 19×, context_search failed 9× (Write capability restriction)
- F-06 cold_restart: 43-min gap → 46 re-reads
- F-01/F-02 context_load/file_breadth: 157KB pre-read, 99 files accessed before first write
- F-04 mutation_spread: 68 files (expected for design-heavy feature)

BASELINE OUTLIERS:
- knowledge_entries_stored: 26.0 vs mean 7.6 (+2.0σ) — positive (large design artifact set)

WHAT WENT WELL:
- Zero coordinator respawns, zero post-completion work, zero sleep hacks
- Low permission friction (1 vs 16.1 mean)

STEWARDSHIP: 4 entries (#3562, #3563, #3565, #3569) — all high quality, no deprecations needed
```

Now spawning the architect for Phase 2.
[tool: mcp__unimatrix__context_search(nan-009 ADR dual type guard phase vocabulary) → ]
=== End recent conversation ===
